{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Sandviper Soulsmiths
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sandviper Soulsmiths]] are unable to say how much the [[scripts]] on the [[Ancestor's Spear]] prevent [[madra]] decay.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
